title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Rides on Dividends Amid Freight Woes

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say

title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Meets Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.90 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $2.67 per share a year ago.
